pages.title: Data-Driven Recipes
pages.text: Since R58, $(l)Mana Blossom$() transforms and $(l)Mana Dew$() production are fully data-driven via JSON.$(br2)Datapack authors can $(l)add, modify, or remove$() rules without touching Java.

pages.title: Blossom Transforms
pages.text: Path: $(l)data/<ns>/blossom_transforms/<id>.json$()$(br2)Format:$(br)$(l){$()$(br)$(l)  "input":     "minecraft:cobblestone",$()$(br)$(l)  "output":    "transcend:runed_stone_bricks",$()$(br)$(l)  "mana_cost": 50$()$(br)$(l)}$()$(br2)Each file = one rule. Default 4 rules ship with the mod and can be overridden by same-named JSON in higher-priority datapacks.

pages.title: Dew Production Config
pages.text: Path: $(l)data/<ns>/dew_production/default.json$()$(br2)Format:$(br)$(l){$()$(br)$(l)  "produce_interval":   20,$()$(br)$(l)  "produce_amount":     1,$()$(br)$(l)  "inject_radius":      4,$()$(br)$(l)  "required_fluid_tag": "minecraft:lava"$()$(br)$(l)}$()$(br2)Override the file to change all dew blocks' tick interval, amount, or scan radius.

pages.title: Use Cases
pages.text: $(l)Custom modpack$(): add cobblestone-to-deepslate-bricks transform with cost 30.$(br2)$(l)Hardcore mode$(): cut dew amount to 0 �?force player to build infrastructure.$(br2)$(l)Festival event$(): increase dew rate temporarily by shipping a higher-priority pack.
